name: xuanche-engine
description: Cloudflare Worker bridge for the Xuanche cultivation world in Notion and GitHub.

scripts.deploy:gateway: npm run check && npx --no-install wrangler pages deploy gateway/public --project-name xuanche-engine-gateway && npm run verify:actions -- https://xuanche-engine-gateway.pages.dev
scripts.deploy:release: npm run check && npx --no-install wrangler deploy && npx --no-install wrangler pages deploy gateway/public --project-name xuanche-engine-gateway && npm run verify:actions -- https://xuanche-engine-gateway.pages.dev
scripts.check: node --check worker.js && node --test && npm run test:actions
